sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 제너럴 다이내믹스는 2025년 3분기 매출 129억 달러, 주당순이익 3.88달러를 기록하며 전년 대비 견조한 성장세를 보였습니다.

keyPoints.text: 전 사업 부문의 실적 성장과 수주 잔고 증가가 이어지며 129억 달러의 매출과 15.8% 증가한 주당순이익을 달성했습니다.
영업활동 현금흐름은 21억 달러로 순이익의 199%에 달하는 강력한 현금 창출 능력을 입증했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 항공우주 부문은 매출이 30.3% 증가하고 영업이익률이 100포인트 개선되는 등 강력한 비즈니스 제트기 수요를 바탕으로 우수한 성과를 냈습니다.
전체 계약 가치는 1,677억 달러에 달하며, 수주 대 매출 비율(book-to-bill)은 1.5대 1을 기록했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 매출은 129억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 10.6% 증가했습니다.
희석 주당순이익(EPS)은 3.88달러로 전년 동기 대비 15.8% 상승했습니다.
분기 중 배당금으로 4억 300만 달러를 지급하고 자본적 지출로 2억 1,200만 달러를 투자했습니다.

watchItems.text: 항공우주 부문의 높은 수주 모멘텀이 향후 분기에도 지속되어 전체 수익성 개선을 견인할 수 있을지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 gd-20250928exhibit9911.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 11011 Sunset Hills Road Reston, Virginia 20190 News www.gd.com Contact: Jeff A. Davis Tel: 703 876 3483 press@generaldynamics.com General Dynamics Reports Third-Quarter 2025 Financial Results October 24, 2025 • Revenue $12.9 billion, up 10.6% from year-ago quarter • Diluted EPS $3.88, up 15.8% from year-ago quarter • $2.1 billion cash from operating activities, 199% of net earnings • Very strong order activity in all four segments RESTON, Va . – General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) today reported third-quarter 2025 operating earnings of $1.3 billion, or $3.88 per diluted share (EPS), on revenue of $12.9 billion. Compared with the year-ago quarter, revenue increased 10.6%, operating earnings increased 12.7%, and diluted EPS increased 15.8%. Operating margin of 10.3% was a   Normalized numeric aliases: $12.9 billion = 129억 달러; $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $12.9 = 12.9달러; $3.88 = 3.88달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러.

basis-point expansion sequentially. “Each of our four segments grew earnings and backlog in the quarter, reflecting solid execution coupled with growing demand,” said Phebe Novakovic, chairman and chief executive officer. “The Aerospace segment in particular performed impressively, growing revenue 30.3% and expanding margins by 100 basis points from the same period a year ago, with order activity for business jets remaining very strong.” Cash and Capital Deployment Net cash provided by operating activities in the quarter totaled $2.1 billion, or 199% of net earnings. During the quarter, the company paid $403 million in dividends and invested $212 million in capital expenditures, ending the quarter with $8  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $403 million = 4억 300만 달러; $212 million = 2억 1,200만 달러; $8 billion = 80억 달러; $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $19.3 billion = 193억 달러; $2.1 = 2.1달러; $403 = 403달러; $8 = 8달러; $212 = 212달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $19.3 = 19.3달러; 100 basis points = 100포인트.

ratio, defined as orders divided by revenue, was 1.5-to-1 for the quarter. Book-to-bill was 1.6-to-1 for the defense segments and 1.3-to-1 for the Aerospace segment. Total estimated contract value, the sum of all backlog components, was $167.7 billion at the end of the quarter. This includes backlog of $109.9 billion and estimated potential contract value, representing management’s estimate of additional value in unfunded indefinite delivery, indefinite quantity (IDIQ) contracts and unexercised options, of $57.8 billion. – more – About General Dynamics Headquartered in Reston, Virginia, General Dynamics is a global aerospace and defense company that offers a broad portfolio of products and services in business aviation; ship construction and repair; land combat vehicles, weapons systems and munitio  Normalized numeric aliases: $167.7 billion = 1,677억 달러; $109.9 billion = 1,099억 달러; $57.8 billion = 578억 달러; $167.7 = 167.7달러; $109.9 = 109.9달러; $57.8 = 57.8달러; 110,000 million = 1,100억 달러.
